info.title: FutureAGI Unified API
info.description: Complete API documentation for FutureAGI platform - Simulate module (scenario management, agent definitions, test executions, call analytics) and Model Hub Evaluations API (evaluation templates, playgrounds, metrics, and execution tracking)

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Health check operations for monitoring server status

tags.name: Eval Playground
tags.description: Test and run evaluations in playground environment

tags.name: Eval Logs & Metrics
tags.description: Evaluation logs, metrics, and execution tracking

get.description: Returns 200 status when server is up and running. No authentication required.
Get paginated list of scenarios for the user's organization with optional search and filtering

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by scenario name or source

post.description: Create a new scenario (dataset, script, or graph-based)

dataset_id.description: Required for dataset kind - ID of dataset to copy

script_url.description: Required for script kind - URL of the script

generate_graph.description: For graph kind - whether to auto-generate graph

graph.description: For graph kind - provide graph data directly

personas.description: List of persona IDs to use

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific scenario

200.description: Scenario details with graph and prompts

put.description: Update scenario name, description, graph, and/or prompt
Update the simulator agent prompts for a scenario

example.content: You are a helpful customer support agent

delete.description: Soft delete a scenario (sets deleted flag)

post.description: Generate and add new rows to a scenario's dataset

get.description: Get paginated list of agent definitions with search

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by agent name, contact number, or description

post.description: Create a new agent definition with initial version

inbound.description: Whether this is an inbound agent

get.description: Retrieve agent definition with version history and active version info
Get all versions of an agent definition with pagination

post.description: Create a new version of an agent definition
Set an agent version as active
Restore a previously deleted agent version

get.description: Get paginated list of simulator agents with search

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by agent name, prompt, model, or voice provider

post.description: Create a new simulator agent configuration

finished_speaking_sensitivity.description: Sensitivity for detecting end of speech

get.description: Get paginated list of run tests with search

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by run test name or agent definition name

post.description: Create a new run test configuration

agent_definition_id.description: ID of the agent definition to test

agent_version.description: Specific agent version (optional, uses latest if not provided)

scenario_ids.description: List of scenario IDs to include in test

dataset_row_ids.description: Specific dataset row IDs to test

eval_config_ids.description: Existing eval config IDs to reuse

put.description: Update the column order in test execution results

get.description: Retrieve transcripts for a specific call execution

post.description: Manually fetch and store transcript for a call from provider
Analyze conversation branches and deviations for a call

get.description: Retrieve all transcripts for all calls in a test execution
List all accessible personas (system + workspace) with pagination and filters

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by persona type ('prebuilt' for system, 'custom' for workspace)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, description, or keywords

post.description: Create a new workspace-level persona

put.description: Update a workspace-level persona (system personas cannot be updated)

get.description: Export run test or test execution data as CSV

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter by phone number or scenario name

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of evaluation groups for the organization

post.description: Create a new evaluation group

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific evaluation group

post.description: Create a new base evaluation template
Create a user-specific evaluation template

dataset_id.description: Dataset ID to apply template to

post.description: Create a custom evaluation template with LLM, Function, or Futureagi type

name.description: Name of the custom template (lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores only)

required_keys.description: Required input keys for the evaluation

config.description: Template configuration with allowed keys: model, proxy_agi, visible_ui, reverse_output, config

400.description: Invalid request data - check template name format or configuration

post.description: Update an existing evaluation template

template_id.description: ID of the template to update
ID of the template to delete

post.description: Create a copy of an existing evaluation template

template_id.description: ID of the template to duplicate

post.description: Test an evaluation template with sample data in the playground environment

template_id.description: ID of the evaluation template to test

mapping.description: Input data mapping for the evaluation

post.description: Provide feedback on evaluation playground execution

get.description: Retrieve SDK code snippet for using evaluation templates programmatically

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: LLM model for the code snippet

post.description: Test an evaluation template with sample data

template_id.description: ID of the template to test

get.description: Retrieve list of available evaluation templates including system and custom templates
Retrieve list of template names and IDs for quick reference
Retrieve logs of evaluation executions with optional filtering

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of logs to return

patch.description: Update column configuration for evaluation logs

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific evaluation log
Retrieve aggregated metrics for evaluations
Retrieve evaluation configuration options and available models

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Api-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API Key for authentication. Click [here](https://app.futureagi.com/dashboard/keys) to access API Key

SecretKeyAuth.name: X-Secret-Key
SecretKeyAuth.description: Secret Key for authentication. Click [here](https://app.futureagi.com/dashboard/keys) to access Secret Key

created_by.description: Name of user who created the group
